ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "contrib_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party receiving the contribution */,
  "target_riding_name" TEXT /* Name of the riding targeted by the contribution */,
  "contrib_date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was made */,
  "contrib_amount" REAL /* Amount of the contribution */,
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the donor making the contribution */,
  "contrib_year" INTEGER /* Year of the contribution */,
  "donee_riding_level" INTEGER /* Indicates if the donee is at a riding level */,
  "target_riding_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target riding */,
  "contributor_riding_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor's riding */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., monetary, in-kind) */,
  "contribution_method" TEXT /* Method of contribution (e.g., online, check, cash) */,
  "contribution_status" TEXT /* Status of the contribution (e.g., pending, confirmed, rejected) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the contribution */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party receiving the contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contrib_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_contrib_year FOREIGN KEY ("contrib_year") REFERENCES contrib_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_contributor_riding_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_riding_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_riding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_target_riding_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_riding_id") REFERENCES ridings ("riding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ridings" (
  "riding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each riding */,
  "riding_name" TEXT /* Name of the riding */,
  "riding_level" TEXT /* Level of the riding (e.g., federal, provincial) */,
  "riding_population" INTEGER /* Population of the riding */,
  "riding_area" REAL /* Area of the riding in square kilometers */,
  "riding_population_density" REAL /* Population density of the riding */,
  "riding_election_year" TEXT /* Year of the last election in the riding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("riding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Full name of the party */,
  "party_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the party name */,
  "party_leader" TEXT /* Name of the party leader */,
  "party_founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the party was founded */,
  "party_headquarters_address" TEXT /* Address of the party's headquarters */,
  "party_website" TEXT /* URL of the party's official website */,
  "party_contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the party */,
  "party_contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email address of the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contrib_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of contributions */,
  "year_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contribution year */,
  "year_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contribution year */,
  "year_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the year is currently active for contributions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "postal_codes" (
  "postal_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each postal code */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the postal code */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the postal code */,
  "postal_code_city" TEXT /* City associated with the postal code */,
  "postal_code_province" TEXT /* Province associated with the postal code */,
  "postal_code_country" TEXT /* Country associated with the postal code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("postal_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donee_ridings" (
  "donee_riding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donee riding */,
  "riding_name" TEXT /* Name of the donee riding */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of the donee riding (e.g., municipal, provincial) */,
  "donee_riding_population" INTEGER /* Population of the donee riding */,
  "donee_riding_area" REAL /* Area of the donee riding in square kilometers */,
  "donee_riding_population_density" REAL /* Population density of the donee riding */,
  "donee_riding_election_year" TEXT /* Year of the last election in the donee riding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donee_riding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributors" (
  "contributor_riding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor's riding */,
  "riding_name" TEXT /* Name of the contributor's riding */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of the contributor's riding (e.g., federal, provincial) */,
  "contributor_riding_population" INTEGER /* Population of the contributor's riding */,
  "contributor_riding_area" REAL /* Area of the contributor's riding in square kilometers */,
  "contributor_riding_population_density" REAL /* Population density of the contributor's riding */,
  "contributor_riding_election_year" TEXT /* Year of the last election in the contributor's riding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_riding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., auditor, researcher, campaign manager) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended, locked) */,
  "user_registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
